title: vaccinium cuneifolium
intro: Vaccinium cuneifolium, also known as the lowbush cranberry or small cranberry, is a low-growing evergreen shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Vaccinium cuneifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. Vaccinium cuneifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
